hero.title: Leaders Hall
introBody: Leadership in Mōchirīī is about being consistently active & supportive of others. Each role carries its own work & all help keep the guild fair.

panel.title: Guild Leadership
body: Leaders may keep a short profile page for introductions, preferred roles & the best way to reach them. Keep it in-game, keep it safe & leave personal info out.
panel.note: Members start with their hall leader for most questions. Requests that affect multiple halls move to the vice leader. Matters that shape policy, long-term direction, or unresolved outcomes move to the guild leader.

council.title: The Council
council.description: These are contact points for support, planning & smooth decisions.

leaders.name: Twills
leaders.summary: Guides culture & long-term direction for Mōchirīī.

leaders.name: Vice Leader
leaders.summary: Coordinates leaders & helps resolve issues that reach beyond one group.

leaders.name: Hall Leader
leaders.summary: First contact for support, event coordination & hall activity.

leaders.name: Isawisima
leaders.summary: Protects fairness, helps mediate conflict & keeps standards clear.

leaders.name: Sinbell
leaders.summary: Supports member well-being, guides arrivals & helps morale.

leaders.name: Meenari
leaders.summary: Keeps daily spaces active, welcomes arrivals & helps members find footing.

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
responsibilities.description: Members receive direction, fair decisions & support. Leadership keeps structure, protects culture & stays present. Members participate in good faith, communicate responsibly & contribute to the guild's pace.

items.title: Direction & strategy
items.description: Sets goals, priorities & the long road for the guild.

items.title: Ops & coordination
items.description: Organizes events, manages roles & keeps daily guild work moving.

items.title: Culture & people
items.description: Maintains standards, resolves conflicts & sustains morale.
